name: nuxt-auth-kit
description: Nuxt module for authentication with Laravel API — login, register, profile, password management, roles & permissions

scripts.dev: npx nuxt-module-build build --stub && npx nuxt-module-build prepare
scripts.dev:prepare: npx nuxt-module-build build --stub && npx nuxt-module-build prepare
scripts.release: npm run build && npm publish --access public
